creator: scott.loga@me.com
text:
Created attachment 216501
KDE Crash Handler Output

FreeBSD Version - 12.1-RELEASE-p7
kde5-5.19.3.20.04.3
qt5.15.0

Hardware: Lenovo T480

Each time the laptop is rebooted, the following message appears in the KDE Crash Handler:

We are sorry, kded5 closed unexpectedly.
You cannot report this error, because kded5 does not provide a bug reporting address.

Details:

Executable: kded5 PID: 2862 Signal: Segmentation fault (11) Time: 7/16/20 4:20:42 PM CDT

Included as an attachment is the developer information from the KDE Crash Reporter.

If more information is required, please don't hesitate to reachout.

Regards,

Scott
